audits.cleanReason: Reviewed six live negation candidates. All six were either procedural prohibitions/instructions or concrete binary diagnostics that changed action in scene, so no negation-addiction KILLs remained.

audits.secondSweep: Completed the dedicated pass-A P5/P6 re-read for inanimate subjects carrying agency or physical-behavior verbs. That sweep surfaced the blanket-scrap, account/ground, and next-post lines.

findings.text: "They died." The blanket scrap tightened in Miri's fist. "And then they got up."
findings.subject: blanket scrap
findings.realAgent: Miri clenching her fist on the cloth
findings.reason: The cloth steals Miri's reaction; her grip is the real action on the page.
findings.suggestedFix: "They died." Miri's fist tightened on the blanket scrap. "And then they got up."

findings.text: Miri's account and the churned ground pointed the same way.
findings.subject: Miri's account and the churned ground
findings.realAgent: The girl's testimony and the physical spoor both indicating north
findings.reason: The sentence launders the inference onto evidence objects instead of naming that the testimony matched the spoor.
findings.suggestedFix: Miri's account matched the churned spoor.

findings.text: The next post would read the flat oval field mark and know this had come off the road.
findings.subject: the next post
findings.realAgent: The relay staff at the next post
findings.reason: The post is standing in for unseen people doing the reading and recognition.
findings.suggestedFix: At the next post, they would read the flat oval field mark and know this had come off the road.

audits.cleanReason: Counted the chapter-level tic families and audited every pass-A tool signal mapped to recurring-tics (three colon lines, two semicolons, two participial attachments, one nod). No tracked tic exceeded its cap, and every tool-flagged line was an isolated functional use rather than a chapter-level repetition problem.

summary.verdictReason: Pass A found three isolated mild intent-smear kills and no moderate or severe kills, so the pass clears with warnings.

notes: structural rhythm concerns: comma_period_ratio is below range
structural rhythm concerns: one_sentence_paragraph_pct is above range

textureMetrics.interpretation: PARTICIPIAL PHRASES: 3.1% (floor: 5.0%, human: 11.0%). Add ', Ving' phrases to connect actions: ', turning back to the fire' / ', gripping the railing with both hands'. These create connective tissue between actions.
